name: Kempen Capital Management - Kempen Sustainable Global High Dividend Fund N.V.
summary: Kempen Capital Management - Kempen Sustainable Global High Dividend Fund N.V. invests in global equities focusing on companies with high dividend yields and sustainable business practices. The fund aims to provide investors with a combination of income and long-term capital appreciation while adhering to environmental, social, and governance (ESG) criteria. It is managed by Kempen Capital Management, based in Amsterdam, Netherlands.
